mapper.sql: select yy_platform.p_id, yy_platform.platform_name, yy_platform.platform_code, yy_platform.platform_logo_url, yy_platform.platform_login_url, yy_platform.platform_home_url, yy_platform.token_domain, up.token as token, yy_platform.token_key, yy_platform.token_storage_type, yy_platform.is_active, yy_platform.sort_order, yy_platform.create_time, yy_platform.update_time from yy_platform left join yy_user_platform up on yy_platform.p_id = up.platform_id
mapper.select: select api_id as apiId, platform_id as platformId, api_name as apiName, api_code as apiCode, api_url as apiUrl, api_method as apiMethod, content_type as contentType, data_encrypt as dataEncrypt, headers as headers, build_body as buildBody, query_params as queryParams, normalize as normalize, response_type as responseType, page_field as pageField, page_size_field as pageSizeField, default_page_size as defaultPageSize, api_type as apiType, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder, remark as remark from yy_platform_api where platform_id = #{p_id}
mapper.insert:
insert into yy_platform
platform_name, platform_code, platform_logo_url, platform_login_url, platform_home_url, token_domain, token_key, token_storage_type, is_active, sort_order, create_time,
#{platformName}, #{platformCode}, #{platformLogoUrl}, #{platformLoginUrl}, #{platformHomeUrl}, #{tokenDomain}, #{tokenKey}, #{tokenStorageType}, #{isActive}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from yy_platform where p_id in
#{pId}
mapper.select:
and up.user_id = #{userId}
order by sort_order desc, p_id asc
